data.description: Add an interactive Approvals tab to the Escalations screen while preserving the existing human-owned beats view. Approval requests must be observable as first-class escalation work, not hidden inside terminal/session history only. The implementation should reuse the durable approval-event plumbing from c30f or later primitives, add detailed structured logging for approval detection and lifecycle events, and surface pending approvals through three user-visible notification paths: lower-right toast, global banner, and inbox/bell item linking directly to the Approvals tab.
